title: Imitation Learning for Bimanual Robot Coordination
description: Adapted the Stanford UMI demonstration-to-policy framework for dual RX150 robot arms to train a bimanual block handoff task. Built a hardware translation layer converting predicted UMI-style actions into physical RX150 joint movements. Presented at SSU SD Expo 2026.

title: Non-Invasive Blood Glucose Monitoring via Breath VOCs
description: Uses volatile organic compound (VOC) signatures in breath, chemical sensors, and a custom handheld device to collect breath data from Type-2 diabetes patients. Machine learning models trained on clinical data are deployed on-device to estimate blood glucose states without finger pricks. Resulted in a U.S. patent and peer-reviewed publication in Biosensors (2025).

title: Sim-to-Real Transfer Learning for Robotic Manipulation
description: A reinforcement learning pipeline for robotic manipulators with a unified control architecture operating in simulation and on physical hardware, incorporating vision-based detection and control, ROS, and NVIDIA GPU acceleration. Findings are integrated directly into the ISL robotics course.

title: Vision-Language-Action Robotic System for Upper-Extremity Rehabilitation
description: A modular VLA robotic system integrating computer vision (YOLOv8), speech recognition (OpenAI Whisper), and neural-network inverse kinematics for cooperative at-home upper-extremity rehabilitation. Developed as a Senior Design project and presented at SSU SD Expo 2026.

title: Robot Control Using Machine Learning and Natural Language Processing
description: Develops deep-learning-based robot control and an autonomous navigation system driven by verbal commands, combining a vision system, a language interpretation system, and path planning.

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robot Arm Control
description: Trained a 4-DOF robotic arm to reach arbitrary target positions using a Dueling Double Deep Q-Network (D3QN), accelerated by human demonstration data. Validated on both the PhantomX Reactor and Dobot Magician arms. Published at ICDT 2025.

title: Radar Remote Detection of Victims Trapped by Debris
description: Developed a low-cost FMCW radar system for locating victims trapped under debris following earthquakes and other disasters. Demonstrated detection of small movements through concrete.

title: Detecting Diabetic Retinopathy from Retinal Images
description: Built an embedded computer vision system for automated detection of diabetic retinopathy from retinal images, targeting low-cost deployment in resource-constrained settings.

title: Gesture-Controlled Robotic Arm
description: Built a sensor-equipped glove that translates hand gestures into robot arm commands, enabling intuitive physical human-robot interaction.

title: Monitoring Air Pollutants Using VOC Sensors
description: Developed systems to detect target VOCs for indoor air quality monitoring and analyzed sensor data using principal component analysis for source classification.
